seo.title: Damn Damn Lyrics Vanamagan
seo.description: Full Damn Damn songs lyrics, Vanamagan Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets,. say damn damn we dont give a damn newyear-il new-vaa poranthukka oh yeh ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Damn Damn'?

The song 'Damn Damn' conveys a carefree and celebratory vibe, encouraging listeners to enjoy life to the fullest.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vanamagan'?

In Vanamagan, the song is featured during a lively celebration scene, highlighting the joy and excitement of the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Damn Damn'?

The details about the singer and music director are currently unknown.

When was 'Damn Damn' released?

'Damn Damn' was released on April 24, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Damn Damn' from the movie Vanamagan is a vibrant and energetic track that encapsulates the spirit of celebration. It features lively lyrics that encourage listeners to embrace joy and dance freely. The upbeat tempo and catchy phrases evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song serves as an anthem for living life king-size and enjoying every moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Damn Damn from Vanamagan is an electrifying anthem that captures the essence of celebration and joy. With its catchy beats and vibrant lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the unique blend of energy and fun that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Say damn damn, we don't care, it's a new year, let's celebrate, oh yeah, damn damn damn damn damn, hey, let's make life big.
Digital Tamil girl, baby, with a stylish flair, baby, singing karaoke like a nightingale, baby, hola hola hola ho.
Everything is in a rush, baby, storms will come, baby, in the white rain, there will be clouds, baby, hola hola hola ho.
Come here, my sweet bird, you are like rain, when it comes, what about you, you too are playful.
Come here, my colorful flag, hold my hand, we will walk and cross the limits.
Say damn damn, we don't care, hey, will you show off your beauty, say damn damn damn damn damn, will you show off like a shark?
Jiggle jiggle, let's dance, okay, biki biki, mini bikini, okay, new fresh fruits, okay, hola hola hola hola.
Okay, let's sing, okay, let's rock, okay, with Lady Gaga and Gana Bala, okay, hola hola hola hola.
In a hundred and twenty lessons, things are changing, in another hundred, love is blooming, listening to dad's words, marriage is happening.
If sugar comes in seven, what will I do? If sugar comes in eight, what will I eat? When everything is busy, you too will work.
If you say to reduce a bit, if you say to add a little, if you say to close a bit, we don't, we don't care.
On Facebook, mom came, dad came, who is it? Love you, saying this, I came before you.
Say damn damn, we don't care, it's a new year, let's celebrate, oh yeah, damn damn damn damn damn, hey, let's make life big.
Digital Tamil girl, baby, with a stylish flair, baby, singing karaoke like a nightingale, baby, hola hola hola ho.
Everything is in a rush, baby, storms will come, baby, in the white rain, there will be clouds, baby, hola hola hola ho.
Come here, my sweet bird, you are like rain, when it comes, what about you, you too are playful.
Come here, my colorful flag, hold my hand, we will walk and cross the limits.
